changelog:
WhatsApp:
- Incoming text messages now move the customer to the top of the list (not just file messages).
- 'View WhatsApp Chat' is now a movable, messenger-style chat head: drag it anywhere and minimize it to a circular badge with the customer's profile picture. The app stays usable while it's open.
- Click a media/document in the chat to instantly select that file in the print list.
- Tidier minimize / close buttons.

UI:
- More crisp SVG icons across the centre toolbar.

Note: this is a required update.

tips.title: What’s New
tips.body: Right-click any image and choose Crop Image to trim it before printing.

tips.title: Tip
tips.body: Add your papers in Settings -> Pricing to track material stock automatically.
